mapper.select: SELECT a.admin_answer_id, a.qna_id, a.admin_answer_content, a.admin_answer_created_at, a.admin_answer_updated_at, q.qna_title FROM admin_answer a JOIN qna q ON a.qna_id = q.qna_id WHERE a.qna_id = #{qnaId} ORDER BY a.admin_answer_created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_answer (qna_id, admin_answer_content, admin_answer_created_at, admin_answer_updated_at) VALUES (#{qnaId}, #{adminAnswerContent}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_answer SET admin_answer_content = #{adminAnswerContent}, admin_answer_updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_answer_id = #{adminAnswerId}
